records.population: People in Australia with influenza symptoms, including older and immunocompromised people
verifiedBoundaries: Age 65 years and older and weakened immunity are identified as higher-risk contexts
Antiviral treatment is a clinician decision rather than universal self-care

records.population: People aged 6 months and older in Australia, including adults 65 years and older and people with specified medical risks
verifiedBoundaries: Older age and specified medical conditions have distinct recommendation pathways
Product choice varies by age and clinical context

records.population: People in Australia with specified medical risk conditions
verifiedBoundaries: A health professional should confirm eligibility and risk

records.population: Close contacts of people who are immunocompromised
verifiedBoundaries: Close contacts are a distinct population
Routine vaccination of contacts can provide indirect protection
